issues.detail: The instructions do not cover error handling or edge cases for setup and runtime failures.

scenarios.name: Native File menu with Cmd/Ctrl+N and SQLite in user home
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses the skill's exact menu.NewMenu/AddSubmenu/keys.CmdOrCtrl/runtime.EventsEmit pattern and the modernc.org/sqlite driver; baseline omits the runtime event emission and uses a different sqlite driver.

scenarios.name: Expose typed Go method to React frontend
scenarios.rationale: Treatment includes JSON struct tags, imports the auto-generated models namespace from wailsjs/go/models, and shows the Bind option in wails.Run — all absent from the baseline.
